---
title: "Supplementary Material"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    highlight-style: github
---

## Table 1. Bivariate model results

```{r table-bivariate}
resulttable1 <- readRDS(here::here("results","tables","glm_bivariate_screened.rds"))

knitr::kable(
  resulttable1,
  caption = "Bivariate logistic regression results: postpartum depressive symptoms ~ prenatal screening"
)
```

## Figure S1. Screening and postpartum depression

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Prenatal screening and postpartum depressive symptoms."

knitr::include_graphics(
  here::here("results","figures","screening_vs_postpartum_depression.png")
)
```
